channel.title: Royal Ivory Hotel Bangkok - Travel Guide & Hotel Updates
channel.description: Latest updates from Royal Ivory Nana Hotel Bangkok including Bangkok travel guides, attraction information, and hotel news. Your guide to Bangkok accommodation and tourism.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2025 Royal Ivory Nana Hotel Bangkok

item.title: Wat Pho Temple Bangkok - Complete Guide from Royal Ivory Hotel
item.description: Explore Wat Pho Temple, home of the famous 46-meter Reclining Buddha, just 45 minutes from Royal Ivory Hotel. Complete guide including traditional Thai massage school, temple history, and transportation details.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Jim Thompson House Bangkok - Thai Silk Heritage Museum Guide
item.description: Discover Jim Thompson House, showcasing traditional Thai architecture and silk heritage, 25 minutes from Royal Ivory Hotel via BTS. Explore six traditional Thai houses and learn about the mysterious American silk entrepreneur.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Grand Palace Bangkok - Ultimate Royal Complex Guide
item.description: Visit Bangkok's most magnificent royal complex, the Grand Palace, featuring the Emerald Buddha and stunning Thai architecture. Complete guide with transportation from Royal Ivory Hotel and insider visiting tips.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Wat Arun Temple Bangkok - Temple of Dawn Complete Guide
item.description: Experience the iconic Wat Arun Temple of Dawn with its stunning riverside location and intricate architecture. Detailed guide from Royal Ivory Hotel including Chao Phraya boat journey and visiting tips.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Terminal 21 Bangkok Shopping Guide - Airport-Themed Mall Adventure
item.description: Explore Terminal 21, Bangkok's unique airport-themed shopping mall, just 1 BTS stop from Royal Ivory Hotel. Discover international floors, diverse dining, and convenient shopping all in one location.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Siam Paragon Bangkok - Luxury Shopping Paradise Guide
item.description: Discover Siam Paragon, Bangkok's premier luxury shopping destination, featuring designer brands, Sea Life aquarium, and gourmet dining. Easy access from Royal Ivory Hotel via BTS.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: MBK Center Bangkok - Budget Shopping Paradise Complete Guide
item.description: Experience MBK Center, Bangkok's famous 8-floor shopping complex known for electronics, fashion, and bargaining culture. Your guide to budget shopping 3 BTS stops from Royal Ivory Hotel.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Nana Plaza Bangkok Guide - Entertainment Complex Next to Royal Ivory
item.description: Explore Nana Plaza, Bangkok's famous entertainment complex, just 200 meters from Royal Ivory Hotel. Complete guide to the 4-story venue with safety tips and insider information.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Bangkok Night Markets Guide - Evening Street Food & Shopping Paradise
item.description: Discover Bangkok's vibrant night markets including Train Night Market Ratchada and Chatuchak Weekend Night Market. Authentic street food and shopping experiences accessible from Royal Ivory Hotel.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: RCA Clubs Bangkok - Modern Nightclub District Guide
item.description: Experience RCA (Royal City Avenue), Bangkok's premier nightclub district featuring international DJs and upscale clubbing. Complete guide with transportation from Royal Ivory Hotel.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Royal Ivory Hotel Bangkok - Best Nana Hotel with Thai Style Rooms
item.description: Discover Royal Ivory Nana Hotel, Bangkok's premier budget luxury hotel featuring authentic Thai-style rooms, no joiner charge policy, and prime location 2 minutes from BTS Nana station.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel

item.title: Bangkok Travel Guide - Complete Attraction Guide from Royal Ivory Hotel
item.description: Your complete Bangkok travel guide featuring cultural attractions, shopping destinations, nightlife venues, and local experiences, all easily accessible from Royal Ivory Hotel's central Nana location.
item.dc:creator: Royal Ivory Hotel
